What I do

Practical Leadership
For Real Teams.

Not corporate hallways. Not motivational posters. Real-world leadership development that works in shops, trucks, and job sites, because that's where I built my career.

🎯
Leadership Coaching

Most owners and managers were promoted because they were good at the job. Nobody taught them how to lead the people doing it. That's where we start.

Through structured 1:1 coaching built on the Maxwell Leadership framework, we work through how you communicate, how you make decisions, how you handle conflict, and how you develop the people around you. Every engagement includes a DISC assessment and debrief so you understand your wiring and how it's landing with your team. Available as 3 or 6-month engagements with bi-weekly sessions, and as group coaching for leadership teams who need to grow together.

Book a call ›
🔥
Workshops & Masterminds

From lunch & learns to 8-week masterminds: structured programs that build communication, trust, accountability, and buy-in across your whole team.

Book a call ›
🥰
BBQ Team Alignment Events

The most fun your team will have while actually learning something. Competitive BBQ meets Lencioni's Five Dysfunctions. Half-day. Unforgettable.

Book an event ›
Maxwell Leadership Certified
About Kevin

Built It. Led It.
Sold It. Now I Teach It.

I didn't come up through a business school. I took over a collision center doing $700K, became manager in six months, spent a decade building the systems and the people and walked away having grown it to over $3 million.

After selling and relocating to Conway, SC, I founded Upward Path Coaching & Consulting with one goal: help the owners and managers who built their companies with their hands become the leaders those companies actually need.

“My mission is to change a whole generation: build leaders, strengthen fathers, and help organizations reach their full potential.”
Book a Free Call ›
Who I work with

Built For
Your Industry.

If your people wear work boots, drive trucks, or run shops, this is for you. I've spent 15 years in the trades and collision world. I speak your language.
